network_summary: Dr. Yaqin Dawoud (DDS) is a Chicago-area dentist who personally owns and operates 2-3 small offices on Chicago's South Side and the inner western suburb of Berwyn. He is listed as DDS/Owner on the NPPES record for Stony Island Dental PC (NPI 1427527365) and as the founder/owner on the Berwyn Dental Clinic consumer website. A third NPI (Chicago Star Dental PC, NPI 1164378600, 3641 E 108th St) is associated via AO reach but has no consumer web presence — the address co-locates with a medical center and may be a dormant or vacated shell. No DSO, MSO, management company, or PE sponsor evidence found across three web searches and two website fetches. This is a dentist's own private multi-office group with no platform layer.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Yaqin Dawoud, DDS — founder and owner, confirmed by NPPES AO credential 'DDS/Owner' on Stony Island Dental PC (NPI 1427527365) and by the Berwyn Dental Clinic website biography.
durable_artifacts: NPPES AO = Yaqin Dawoud DDS/Owner on NPI 1427527365 (Stony Island Dental PC)
NPPES AO = Yaqin Dawoud on NPI 1316675176 (Berwyn Dental Clinic) and NPI 1164378600 (Chicago Star Dental PC) — ao_reach=3 across ZIPs 60402 and 60617
Berwyn Dental Clinic website (berwyndentalclinic.com/about-us/) identifies Dr. Yaqeen Dawoud as founder (est. 2011)
Phone numbers 708-351-4582 (Stony Island) and 708-351-4562 (Chicago Star) share prefix — consistent with same operator
All three NPIs are organizational (NPI-2) with no named parent organization in NPPES
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Chicago Star Dental PC (NPI 1164378600, 3641 E 108th St, ZIP 60617) has no consumer web presence. A Yelp/web search for the address returns Mohana Medical Center (a family-medicine clinic), not a dental practice. The phone (708) 351-4562 differs from Stony Island Dental's (708) 351-4582 by one digit — may be a typo or a forwarding number. This location may be dormant, closed, or never consumer-active. Downstream gate should attempt a live phone verification before counting it in the corporate denominator.
evidence_chain: AO signal: NPPES lists Yaqin Dawoud as authorized official on 3 org-NPIs spanning ZIP 60402 (Berwyn) and ZIP 60617 (Chicago South Side), ao_reach=3. Documentary corroboration: (1) berwyndentalclinic.com/about-us/ identifies Dr. Yaqeen Dawoud as founder and sole owner since 2011 — single-location website, no DSO/MSO/management-company language; (2) opennpi.com/provider/1427527365 confirms NPPES credential 'DDS/Owner' for Yaqin Dawoud at Stony Island Dental PC. No MSO, PE sponsor, management-services entity, or DSO platform found in any source. The pattern is a dentist personally holding the authorized-official role at each of his own entities — classic dentist_multi structure.
future_app_notes: 1. Chicago Star Dental PC (3641 E 108th St) may be closed/dormant — recommend phone verification before counting. 2. Raya Dawoud (DMD) appears at Dental Town Chicago (a separate DSO-structured group with founder Dr. Sinan Razzak) — possible family member but operating in a different network; do NOT conflate with Yaqin Dawoud's independent group. 3. If Berwyn Dental Clinic or Stony Island Dental ever lists a second address on its website, that would be a corroborating multi-location signal worth re-checking. 4. No EIN found for any of the three NPIs in the source data — EIN lookup could further confirm the common-owner structure.
